overall.description: Static cinematic view of a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis at sunset, showcasing towering skyscrapers with illuminated windows and holographic billboards against an orange and purple sky. The scene is captured from an elevated hillside overlook with sparse vegetation, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: hillside overlook of futuristic metropolis at sunset

agents.ego_description: standing stationary on a hillside vantage point, observing the cityscape and sunset

entered.detail: dense cluster of cyberpunk skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signage forming the city center
large orange sun low on the horizon casting warm light through atmospheric haze
large vertical billboard with glowing red and orange holographic display on building facade
tall industrial crane structure silhouetted against the sky among the skyscrapers
curved elevated highway ramps leading into the city center
dark silhouetted branches of evergreen trees framing the right side of the view

segments.scene_description: A static panoramic view from an elevated hillside overlooking a sprawling cyberpunk city at golden hour. The futuristic skyline dominates the horizon with towering glass structures, construction cranes, and glowing advertisements, while the setting sun bathes the scene in warm orange light. Sparse vegetation frames the right side of the shot, and a highway interchange curves toward the city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, panoramic vista from a rugged hillside that captures the sprawling scale of a futuristic metropolis during the golden hour. It begins with a wide view of the horizon, where towering glass structures and construction cranes pierce a sky bathed in warm orange light. As the eye moves across the skyline, the glow of holographic advertisements begins to intensify against the deepening colors of the sunset. The scene then expands to reveal a curving highway interchange that leads the viewer's gaze from the sparse hillside vegetation toward the dense, illuminated heart of the city center.
